avoid: Do not use handwritten rank-16 kernels unless cuBLAS path is proven insufficient
Do not hardcode hidden dimension sizes
Do not rely on result caching as a general optimization
evidence: aggregate_speedup 0.9995 indicates no performance improvement over torch
profile bottleneck identified as multiple ATen GEMM and add launches
candidate is exactly the ATen reference implementation
recommended_actions: Implement pure cuBLAS three-SGEMM path: one SGEMM for W@X, one for B.T@X, one for A@(B.T@X) with beta=1 accumulation
Avoid ATen matrix multiply calls to reduce kernel launch overhead
Ensure correct row-major to column-major handling with cuBLAS op flags
Test on all shapes (3584, 4096, 4608) for consistent performance
